CREATE TABLE test_set (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
CREATE TABLE test_subset (id UInt32, subset_values Array(Int32));
SELECT hasAll(values, subset_values) AS result FROM test_set JOIN test_subset ON test_set.id = test_subset.id;
SELECT hasAll(values, [1, 2]) AS result FROM test_set WHERE id = 1;
SELECT hasAll(values, subset_values) FROM (SELECT values FROM test_set) AS set_inner, (SELECT subset_values FROM test_subset) AS subset_inner;
SELECT hasAll([1, 2], [1, 2, 3]) AS result FROM test_set WHERE id = 2;
SELECT hasAll(ARRAY(SELECT distinct values FROM test_set), ARRAY(SELECT distinct subset_values FROM test_subset));
SELECT hasAll([1, 2, 3], [1, 3]) AS result FROM test_set WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_subset WHERE subset_values = [1, 2]);
CREATE TABLE test_edge_cases (id UInt32, edge_values Array(Int32));
SELECT id, hasAll(edge_values, [200]) AS result FROM test_edge_cases;
